title: Isoloma cordifolium

taxonomy: Isoloma cordifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Isoloma. The plant is native to New Zealand and is often found growing in shaded areas. Isoloma cordifolium is classified as a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern. It is also known by its common name, the heart-leaved fern.
